payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow surrounding frame, vertical rectangular shape and matte finish; mostly visible in the crop but slightly cropped at the top edge — estimated about 1.0 m from the camera.
